Description: Outcome: Returning user can open app and enter practice flow without friction.

Summary: Initialize mobile app shell and navigation
Acceptance Criteria: App launches with stable tab/navigation shell and environment switching.

Summary: Initialize backend service and health endpoints
Acceptance Criteria: `/health` and `/version` return expected metadata in development and staging.

Summary: Set up CI for lint, typecheck, and core smoke tests
Acceptance Criteria: Pull requests are blocked on lint, typecheck, and core smoke test failures.
Logs include request id, user id when present, and structured error class.
Auth endpoints validate input, rate-limit, and manage sessions correctly.
User can sign up, log in, and remain signed in after app restart.
Client can bootstrap authenticated user state from `/auth/me`.

Description: Outcome: User can record and save today’s clip with high confidence.

Acceptance Criteria: Journeys table, constraints, and indexes are applied cleanly in dev/stage.

Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-020, HON-011.
Acceptance Criteria: User can create/list/update/archive only their own journeys.
User can open camera, record a short clip, preview, retake, and proceed to save.
Backend returns valid signed upload URL scoped to authenticated user journey.

Summary: Implement clip create/replace API + one-clip-per-day rule
Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-031, HON-020.
Acceptance Criteria: Clip save enforces one clip per journey/day with deterministic replace behavior.

Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-030, HON-031, HON-032.
Acceptance Criteria: Clip uploads and appears in journey timeline immediately after successful save.

Summary: Add clip save state machine and retry queue
Acceptance Criteria: User sees explicit saving/uploading/failed states and can recover without clip loss.

Summary: Simplify Practice home to one dominant action
Acceptance Criteria: Practice screen answers skill/day/today/next-action in <= 3 seconds and prioritizes Record Today.

Description: Outcome: Improvement is visible through a simple history and comparison model.

Summary: Implement timeline API keyed for day-based history
Acceptance Criteria: Clip history supports stable day ordering and efficient day lookup.
User can replay clips smoothly in app with tap play/pause.

Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-023, HON-035.
Acceptance Criteria: Calendar shows practiced vs empty days and supports month navigation.
Tapping a practiced day opens that day clip with date/day context.
System can select and validate comparison pairs (Day 1 vs Today, selected day vs latest).

Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-093, HON-040.
Acceptance Criteria: User can select two days in calendar and launch comparison in one flow.

Summary: Promote Day 1 vs Today as primary proof moment
Acceptance Criteria: Comparison is discoverable from top of Progress and reachable in <= 2 taps.

Description: Outcome: Users get lightweight reinforcement and stable core loop quality.

Acceptance Criteria: Current streak is calculated accurately by journey and user-local day boundaries.

Summary: Expose streak/day fields in journey APIs
Acceptance Criteria: Practice and progress surfaces receive trustworthy day count and streak values.
User can store and fetch a single daily reminder setting.
User can enable reminders and set one daily reminder time.

Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-033, HON-051.
Acceptance Criteria: After save, user sees concise day/streak confirmation with subtle feedback.
Core loop events are validated and stored with consistent schema.

Summary: Emit core loop events in mobile
Acceptance Criteria: App opened, record tapped, recording completed, clip saved, comparison viewed are emitted reliably.

Summary: Add backend tests for core APIs
Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-021, HON-032, HON-040.
Acceptance Criteria: Core auth/journey/clip/compare APIs have robust happy and edge-path coverage.

Summary: Add mobile smoke tests for main loop
Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-033, HON-095, HON-053.
Acceptance Criteria: Smoke tests cover auth -> practice -> save -> compare and reminder settings.

Description: Owner: Mobile/Backend. Depends on: HON-072, HON-073.
Acceptance Criteria: Main loop performance is stable across supported device matrix.
